💡 How to Use This Guide

🔍 Search Smart

Search by symptom (e.g. "fever", "blood pressure"), by herb name, or by condition. Results update instantly.

🗂️ Use Filters

Tap the filter tabs to narrow to Healing, Love, Protection, Prosperity and more category types.

❤️ Save Favourites

Tap the heart icon on any card to save it. View all your saved herbs in the Favourites tab below.

📋 Ritual Steps

Each herb has step-by-step preparation instructions. Follow exactly for best spiritual and medicinal results.

⚠️ Safety First

Always read the Cautions section. Consult a trained herbalist or doctor before starting any protocol.

🌕 Moon Timing

Many rituals are most powerful on new or full moons. Check the Ritual Day listed for each herb for best results.

📞 When to Seek a Herbalist For serious illness, pregnancy complications, or conditions that do not improve within 7–14 days, please consult a qualified traditional herbalist (Babalowo/Babalawo) or licensed medical professional. This guide shares ancestral knowledge for education and spiritual practice.

ANCESTRAL PROTECTION SYSTEM

🛡️ Protection Toolkit

Proven African methods for protecting your home, person, family, and spirit against seen and unseen threats.

🚨 Emergency Spiritual First Aid

  1. Sprinkle sea salt across ALL doorways and windowsills of your home immediately
  2. Burn frankincense or sage in every room, praying aloud as you go
  3. Wash your hands and face with cold water mixed with a pinch of camphor
  4. Eat 3 raw cloves of garlic immediately — this creates an internal spiritual shield
  5. Sleep with a cup of water mixed with salt beside your bed — replace each morning
  6. Call upon your ancestors by name: "I call on [ancestor's name] to stand guard over me now"

💚 NO MONEY NEEDED

Free Spiritual Practices

You already have everything you need. Your voice, your body, the sun, the moon, water, earth, and fire — these are the oldest medicines. They cost nothing. They have never failed.

🆘 Right Now, With Nothing — Start Here
1. Go somewhere quiet. Sit down.
2. Place your right hand on your chest.
3. Say the names of your parents and grandparents aloud.
4. Say: "I am [your name]. I am the child of [parent's name]. I need help today."
5. Be still for 2 minutes. You have just done the most complete ancestral ritual possible.
You needed nothing. The ancestors heard you.
💚 Your Poverty is Not a Barrier to Healing

The most powerful healers in history owned nothing. What you carry inside you — your voice, your breath, your love — is the medicine the ancestors gave you before you were born.

🌍 DEEP ANCESTRAL KNOWLEDGE

African Traditions

🌍 Living Traditions

This knowledge belongs to the communities that created it. It is shared in reverence and with gratitude to every ancestor who preserved it.

FOR PARENTS & CAREGIVERS

👶 Children's Health Guide

Safe African herbal and spiritual guidance for children from birth through adolescence. Every remedy here is rooted in Nigerian ancestral tradition and marked clearly for age safety.

⚠️ Safety First

Always consult a qualified doctor or paediatrician for serious illness in children. These remedies support — they do not replace — medical care. When in doubt, go to hospital first.

FOR WOMEN & MOTHERS

🤰 Pregnancy & Motherhood

From conception to postpartum — the complete African herbal and spiritual guide for Nigerian mothers. What to eat, what to avoid, how to protect, and how to heal.

⚠️ Medical Safety

Always inform your midwife, nurse, or doctor about any herbs you take during pregnancy. Some herbs cause uterine contractions. When uncertain — ask a professional first.

SUCCESS & PROSPERITY

💼 Career, Exams & Business

For students, job seekers, business owners, and everyone building something in Nigeria. Ancestral backing for the modern hustle.

🌿 African Herbal Spiritual Guide

Spiritual preparation is the foundation — but show up, do the work, and be excellent. The ancestors back those who also back themselves.

FAITH × TRADITION

🙏 Prayer & Sacred Texts

For Nigerian Christians and Muslims — how your faith and ancestral herbal tradition work together, not against each other. Quranic healing, Biblical herbs, and the science of sacred words.

🙏 All Paths Lead to Healing

God made the herbs. The Prophet (SAW) endorsed them. The Bible names them. Your ancestors used them. These are not contradictions — they are confirmations.
